source.description: A reviewed six-panel graphite-and-colored-pencil process contact sheet.
source.notes: One consistent old-fashioned manual coffee grinder in a shallow three-quarter view on warm off-white paper, with no lettering, logo, coffee beans, cup, spoon, table scene, hands, or decorative border.

process_strategy: The sequence locks one boxy wooden body, top plane, hopper footprint, drawer reserve, and crank path; wraps the cabinet around those guides; adds the hopper, crank, knob, drawer, and feet without drawing hidden top or front detail; introduces seams, screws, wood grain, and shadow; then shades and colors every established form before final cleanup only.

final_elements.name: cabinet box guides, top plane, hopper footprint, drawer reserve, crank path, and ground axis
final_elements.description: Light construction fixes one shallow three-quarter cabinet with a circular hopper reserve, centered drawer footprint, raised crank path, and stable ground line.

final_elements.name: coffee-grinder cabinet silhouette with front and side planes, top rim, and three visible short feet
final_elements.description: Confident outer contours turn the box guides into a readable wooden grinder cabinet with three visible feet while preserving the hopper and drawer reserves.

final_elements.name: domed metal hopper, top collar, crank arm, wooden knob, drawer front, and drawer pull
final_elements.description: The hopper and hand crank establish the grinding mechanism while the drawer and pull complete the front without hidden cabinet detail.

final_elements.name: cabinet seams, two front-corner screws, hopper-collar bolts, restrained wood grain, metal hatch marks, and cast shadow
final_elements.description: A few structural seams, exactly two front-corner screws, small hopper-collar bolts, directional texture, and one soft shadow add material information without clutter.

final_elements.name: warm walnut and ochre pencil with cool gray metal and graphite depth
final_elements.description: Restrained colored pencil separates the wooden cabinet, metal hopper and crank, wooden knob, drawer, hardware, and shadow while leaving visible paper tooth.

frames.visible_job: Places the cabinet box, top plane, hopper footprint, drawer reserve, crank path, three visible foot positions with a hidden rear-foot reserve, and ground axis at one fixed angle and scale.
introduces: cabinet box guides, top plane, hopper footprint, drawer reserve, crank path, and ground axis

frames.visible_job: Wraps the guides with the front and side planes, top rim, clean lower edges, and three visible short feet while keeping the hopper and drawer footprints blank.
introduces: coffee-grinder cabinet silhouette with front and side planes, top rim, and three visible short feet
requires_prior_elements: cabinet box guides, top plane, hopper footprint, drawer reserve, crank path, and ground axis

frames.visible_job: Builds the domed metal hopper and collar, follows the raised crank path to its wooden knob, and adds the drawer front and pull inside the reserved footprint.
introduces: domed metal hopper, top collar, crank arm, wooden knob, drawer front, and drawer pull
requires_prior_elements: cabinet box guides, top plane, hopper footprint, drawer reserve, crank path, and ground axis
coffee-grinder cabinet silhouette with front and side planes, top rim, and three visible short feet

frames.visible_job: Adds cabinet seams, exactly two front-corner screws, small hopper-collar bolts, restrained wood grain, a few metal hatch marks, and one cast shadow to established forms.
introduces: cabinet seams, two front-corner screws, hopper-collar bolts, restrained wood grain, metal hatch marks, and cast shadow
requires_prior_elements: coffee-grinder cabinet silhouette with front and side planes, top rim, and three visible short feet
domed metal hopper, top collar, crank arm, wooden knob, drawer front, and drawer pull

frames.visible_job: Adds warm walnut and ochre pencil to the cabinet and knob, cool gray to the hopper and crank, graphite depth to the drawer and hardware, and blended shadow.
introduces: warm walnut and ochre pencil with cool gray metal and graphite depth
requires_prior_elements: coffee-grinder cabinet silhouette with front and side planes, top rim, and three visible short feet
domed metal hopper, top collar, crank arm, wooden knob, drawer front, and drawer pull
cabinet seams, two front-corner screws, hopper-collar bolts, restrained wood grain, metal hatch marks, and cast shadow

final_step.visible_job: Only strengthens the established cabinet, hopper, crank, drawer, hardware, textures, restrained color, and cast shadow.
allowed_changes: small highlight clarification on established wood and metal forms

rejection_checks: No cabinet plane, foot, hopper, collar, crank, knob, drawer, pull, seam, screw, texture, color area, or shadow may first appear in the final panel.
The grinder must retain one shallow three-quarter view, cabinet proportions, hopper placement, crank angle, drawer position, scale, and crop across all six panels.
Reserve the hopper and drawer footprints from step one; do not render finished top-plane or front-panel grain beneath either covering form.
Reject lettering, logos, coffee beans, cups, spoons, hands, table scenes, extra appliances, or decorative borders.
The finish must read as an attainable warm pencil still life rather than glossy product art, a 3D render, or a vector diagram.
